meta.description: Full coverage added. v1.10.0: added Report Generation spec, Requirements Versioning (BackOffice), Tableau, API Exposure, expanded Jira/Jama integration details. 47 nodes, 71 links. Step O: verified Report Configurator on Release Detail page, Tracking Tools on Product Configuration, Reports & Dashboards tab on Landing.

nodes.label: Login Page
nodes.description: This page allows users to authenticate via Schneider Electric SSO through the LEAP enterprise portal. Successful login redirects to the PICASso landing page.

headings: PICASso - Product Information, Cybersecurity And Security Software

nodes.label: Landing Page (HomePage)
nodes.description: This page allows users to access their personalized dashboard with four tabs (My Tasks, My Products, My Releases, My DOCs), create new products, access role delegation, and view reports & dashboards.

nodes.label: My Tasks Tab
nodes.description: This tab allows users to view and manage all pending action items assigned to them across releases. Supports filtering by task name and status, sorting, and pagination to navigate to specific release details.

nodes.label: My Products Tab
nodes.description: This tab allows users to browse all products they are associated with. Supports search, status filtering, active/inactive toggle, pagination, and product inactivation for authorized users.

nodes.label: My Releases Tab
nodes.description: This tab allows users to view all releases they are involved in across products. Supports filtering by product, release status, and search, with release inactivation and cloning actions.

nodes.label: My DOCs Tab
nodes.description: This tab allows users to view and manage Digital Offer Certifications (DOC) for their products. Supports search and status filtering to navigate to DOC detail pages.

nodes.label: New Product Form
nodes.description: This page allows users to register a new product by providing product information (name, type, definition, organizational hierarchy), configuring tracking tools (Jira/Jama/Azure DevOps), assigning the product team, and setting security parameters. Includes Digital Offer toggle for DOC eligibility.

fields.name: Product Type
fields.notes: Options change based on Product Definition selection. AJAX partial refresh after selection.

fields.name: Digital Offer
fields.notes: When checked, reveals Digital Offer Details accordion with VESTA ID grid (IT Owner, Project Manager searchboxes). Also enables DOC top-level tab after Product Owner is assigned.

fields.name: Data Protection & Privacy
fields.notes: When toggled ON, triggers confirmation dialog on Save. Enables 'Dedicated Privacy Advisor' field in Product Team tab. Activates DPP tasks in new releases.

fields.name: Brand Label

fields.name: Org Level 2

fields.name: Process requirements

nodes.label: Product Detail (View Mode)
nodes.description: Product Details page: Product Info / Organization / Team / Configuration / Security Summary / Attestation Details / Data Privacy Summary / DOC Summary tabs. NEW: Cross-Organizational Development toggle + Dev Org L1/L2/L3 (in Organization tab); Attestation Details tab (Software Attestation Date + Verifier, conditional mandatory); Product Type now editable after creation with confirmation popup; Product inactivation via 3-dots menu + Actions column (condition: no ongoing/completed releases, mandatory justification); Data Privacy Summary + DOC Summary (collapsable); Product Changes History link in header; Actions Management link in header (opens standalone page in new tab).

nodes.label: Release Detail Page
nodes.description: This page allows users to manage the full release lifecycle through a 7-stage workflow (Creation & Scoping through Final Acceptance). Provides tabs for questionnaire, process/product requirements with Jira/Jama integration, cybersecurity residual risks (10 categories), FCSR decision and approval, and actions tracking. SBOM STATUS: dropdown (In Progress/Submitted/N/A) in CSRR SDL Process Summary; N/A→Justification mandatory; In Progress/Submitted→SBOM ID field; editable at Post FCSR stage; immutable after Final Acceptance; validation at SA&PQL Sign Off (if Submitted, SBOM ID mandatory) and Final Acceptance. PEN TEST CONDITIONS (Existing Product Onboarding): 'Was pen test performed' (Yes/No) field; Yes→Last Pen Test Type (Full/Partial/Continuous)+Last Pen Test Date; No→Justification mandatory. CSRR Security Defects: validation per pen test answer. Fields immutable after release completion. Missing at FCSR Review→auto-creates action 'Review Penetration Testing Details fields'.

header.workflowStagesNote: Separate tablist from content tabs — indicates pipeline progress

tabs.name: Release Details
tabs.description: Release version, target date, change summary, release type, continuous pen testing, associated SE products

tabs.name: Roles & Responsibilities
tabs.description: SDL roles (9 slots) and Product Team members (9 slots) assignment with edit link for each

tabs.name: Questionnaire
tabs.description: Risk assessment questionnaire to scope requirements. Start/Edit/Submit questionnaire. Auto-calculates Risk Classification and Privacy Risk.
tabs.emptyState: There are no questionnaires available for this release
tabs.note: 6 content tabs remain disabled (CSS class disabled-tab) until Questionnaire is submitted

tabs.name: Process Requirements
tabs.description: SDL practice requirements grouped by category with status management, bulk edit, XLSX import/export, Jira/Jama submission

applicabilityLock.description: Requirements with 'Can be marked as Not Applicable = No' (configured in BackOffice) cannot be set to N/A

parentChildSelection.description: When selecting parent requirement, dropdown popup appears with options to select parent only or parent + all sub-requirements
parentChildSelection.triggerOn: Parent requirement checkbox click or Select All checkbox
parentChildSelection.disabledWhen: 'Show process sub-requirements' toggle = off on Product Configuration

tabs.name: Product Requirements
tabs.description: Product-specific requirements grouped by category with same management capabilities as Process Requirements plus Custom Requirements

tabs.name: Review & Confirm
tabs.description: Scope review with requirements summary, previous FCSR/PCC decisions, recommendations, actions, scope review decision. Actions Summary bar chart.

validations: SA&PQL stage: if SBOM Status = Submitted → SBOM ID mandatory
Final Acceptance: SBOM Status + SBOM ID must be non-empty
Final Acceptance: if SBOM Status = In Progress → SBOM ID mandatory

subSections.name: System Design
subSections.description: Architecture diagrams, components list, countermeasures, residual risk. Only for Product Definition = System.

penTestConditions.fcsrAutoAction: If mandatory Pen Test fields missing at FCSR Review → system auto-creates action 'Review Penetration Testing Details fields' with Pre-Condition status
penTestConditions.fcsrValidation: SVV-4 Pen Test status ≠ Not Applicable/Postponed → Pen Test Details must be completed at SA&PQL Submit

tabs.name: FCSR Decision
tabs.description: FCSR participants recommendations and final decision

tabs.name: Data Protection & Privacy Review
tabs.description: Privacy review sections with questions, evidence collection, ratings, maturity levels. Visible when DP&P is applicable.

dialogs.description: Right sidebar showing stage details, responsible individuals, submission progress, rework justification

options: Change version (with optional status reset to Planned)

dialogs.label: Parent/Sub-Requirement Selection Popup
dialogs.description: Dropdown popup when parent requirement checkbox is clicked

nodes.label: DOC Detail Page
nodes.description: This page allows users to manage the Digital Offer Certification (DOC) through a 5-stage workflow (Initiate → Issue Certification). DOC is auto-created when the first release is registered on a Digital Offer product. Covers ITS controls scoping, risk assessment, and certification issuance.

workflowPipeline.description: Horizontal 5-stage pipeline with stage name, checkmark, and completion info (user + date) for completed stages. 'Hide Flow'/'Show Flow' toggle.

tabs.name: Digital Offer Details
tabs.description: DOC details in read-only mode with Edit Details toggle. Fields: DOC Name, VESTA ID, Release, Target Release Date, Link for Related Documents, DOC Reason.

readOnlyFields.notes: Shows 'Other Release' label when a custom release version is used, with additional 'Release Version' field

editableFields.placeholder: Specify the reason of creating Digital Offer Certification

tabs.name: Roles & Responsibilities

tabs.notes: Roles marked with * are optional/assignable. Each member cell shows avatar icon + display name.

tabs.name: ITS Checklist
tabs.description: Grid of IT Security controls to scope, assess, and track. Each control links to its own Control Detail page.

Disaster Recovery Planning and Cyber Resilience

tabs.notes: Description and Evidence Expectation show tooltips on hover with full text. Status and Risk Level display color-coded badges.

tabs.description: Grid of remediation actions with findings tracking. Available after Risk Assessment stage.
tabs.notes: Action Name is a clickable link. Findings column shows count with clickable link (e.g. '1 Finding'). Due Date shows overdue tooltip indicator when past due.

tabs.description: Summary of risk assessments from SDL FCSR, Data Protection & Privacy, and ITS Controls. Available at Risk Summary Review stage.

tabs.description: Final certification outcome with approvals and unresolved findings. Available at Issue Certification stage.

nodes.label: DOC Initiation Modal
nodes.description: This dialog allows users to initiate a new Digital Offer Certification by specifying VESTA ID, IT Owner, and Project Manager. Available only for products with Digital Offer enabled.

nodes.label: Control Detail Page
nodes.description: This page shows the full detail of a single ITS security control including its description, evidence expectation, risk assessment, findings, evidence links, and comment thread. Accessed from the ITS Checklist tab on DOC Detail.

sections.name: Description
sections.description: Full description of the IT security control.

sections.name: Evidence Expectation
sections.description: Bulleted list of expected evidence items. Formatted with bullet points.

sections.name: Category
values: Malware Protection and Technical Vulnerability Management
Disaster Recovery Planning and Cyber Resilience

justification.name: Justification
justification.description: Free-text justification for the assigned risk level

sections.name: FINDINGS
sections.description: List of findings associated with this control.

sections.name: EVIDENCE LINKS
sections.description: Grid of attached evidence with clickable URLs and link names.

sections.name: COMMENTS
sections.description: Chronological comment thread. Each entry shows date/time, user avatar + name, and message text.

nodes.label: DOC History Popup
nodes.description: This popup displays the full audit trail of changes to a DOC, filterable by activity type and date range. Opened via 'View History' link in the DOC Detail header.

nodes.label: Roles Delegation Page
nodes.description: This page allows users to delegate their roles and responsibilities to designated individuals for a specified period. Supports individual and bulk delegation, delegation history tracking, CSO-level delegation for organizational users, and automatic task reassignment to delegates.

elements.pageDescription: Delegate your roles and permissions to another person for a specified period.

tabs.name: My Roles
tabs.description: List of all roles for logged-in user with delegation capabilities. No pagination — all rows loaded at once.

tabs.name: Org Level Users
tabs.description: List of users in logged-in user's organizational scope with search and pagination

dialogs.label: Delegate Role Dialog
dialogs.title: Delegate Role
dialogs.description: Start the delegation of your {role} role and responsibilities to another person for a specified period, while retaining all your existing permissions.
dialogs.infoMessage: it's recommended to set the delegation period to no more than 3 months unless a longer duration is necessary.

filters.name: Search
filters.placeholder: Search by description, user or action name

nodes.label: Actions Management Page
nodes.description: This page allows users to view and manage all actions across releases for a product. Supports creating, editing, and submitting actions to Jira, filtering by status/release/assignee/category, viewing action history, and monitoring action status distribution via bar chart.

nodes.label: Requirements Update Pop-up
nodes.description: This dialog allows users to review requirement changes (updated, replaced, added, removed) when creating a release from a previous version. Shows change details with Apply Selected/Keep Current Version actions for each change type.

nodes.label: Update Requirements Status
nodes.description: This dialog allows users to bulk update and transfer requirement statuses from replaced requirements to their replacements. Supports status transfer, evidence and justification copying.

nodes.label: Requirements Traceability View
nodes.description: This view allows users to see traceability between requirements through mapping pairs. Shows hierarchical relationships with focus filters (All, Only gaps, Only linked) and priority filtering.

nodes.label: Review & Confirm Tab (Scope Review)
nodes.description: New 'Review and Confirm' tab on release (between Product Requirements and DPP Review). Tab disabled at Creation&Scoping (first time); enabled from Review&Confirm stage onwards. SECTIONS: (1) Requirements Summary (collapsed by default): Process Req donut chart (SDL Practice filter, Include Sub-reqs toggle) + Product Req donut chart (Category filter, Source filter, Include Sub-reqs toggle). Snapshot frozen when moving to Manage; live again on rework. Highcharts donut; burger menu (full screen/print/download). (2) Previous FCSR Summary (collapsed): Previous Release dropdown → Status, Privacy Risk, Risk Classification, FCSR Decision date, PCC Decision, FCSR Approval decision, Exception Required, FCSR Approver, Comments, Cybersecurity Risk Summary, Data Privacy Risk Summary sections. (3) Scope Review Participants (open): Add Participant button; Participant Name (from R&R), Role (auto), Recommendation (Approved/Approved with Actions/Rework), Comments; Delete with confirmation. Read-only on Manage+ stages. (4) Key Discussion Topics (open): Add topic; Topic Name + Discussion Details; Date + Added By (auto). Editable on current stage; read-only on next stage. No delete after stage advance. (5) Scope Review Decision (open): dropdown (Approved/Approved with Actions/Rework); mandatory for submission to Manage. (6) Actions section (open): 'Action Plan for Scope Review Decisions' header; full action management; Submit to Jira; Refresh Data From Jira; Action Summary button. ROLES: SA, LOB SL, BU SO, Privacy Advisor, Superuser, Global = edit all; PO, SM = edit Actions only; others = view. Release History: 'Scope Review & Confirm Tab Update' (participants/topics/decision); 'Actions update'; 'Jira Submission'. API: new GetScopingReview method. Clone: no R&C data carried over. BackOffice: Scope Review Decision LoV (Approved, Approved with Actions, Rework).

processRequirementsSubSection.chart: Donut chart - % of requirements per status

productRequirementsSubSection.chart: Donut chart - % of requirements per status

requirementsSummary.note: Snapshot frozen when release moves to Manage stage. Reflects real-time data if sent back to rework.

fields: Previous Release (dropdown - latest on Post FCSR/Final Acceptance by default)
previousFcsrSummary.hiddenWhen: No previous release has PCC Decision or Data Privacy Summary

cybersecurityRiskSummary.content: Tiles for each CSRR group showing selected risk from previous stage. Clickable → opens CSRR section in new tab.

dataPrivacyRiskSummary.content: Tiles for each DP section showing selected risk. Clickable → opens DP Review section in new tab.
dataPrivacyRiskSummary.hiddenWhen: No DP Risk Summary on selected previous release

releaseTeamOption.defaultUser: currently logged-in user if no recommendation yet

scopeReviewParticipants.editDeleteRestriction: Once release on Manage stage, participants locked to read-only

keyDiscussionTopics.restrictions: Topics from other stages not editable/deletable; only newly added topics can be deleted in same stage

nodes.label: Delegated Requirements Traceability
nodes.description: Dialog for managing delegated requirements traceability. When requirement status is set to 'Delegated', users specify target Product, Release, Requirement, Due Date, and delegated requirement part. Supports manual single/bulk delegation and XLSX file upload. Shows 'Delegated From' details in linked requirements and on Cybersecurity Residual Risks tab.

linkedDisplay: Delegated Requirements section in CSRR tab

nodes.label: Requirements Management
nodes.description: Process Requirements + Product Requirements tabs within release. Hierarchy: SDL Practice/Category → Requirement → Sub-requirement. Sub-reqs collapsed by default; arrow to expand; 'Show All Sub-Requirements' toggle. Single table (no per-practice pagination); SDL Practice filter; Requirement Order Code (drag-drop reorder). Toggle 'Show Not Selected Requirements' (renamed from 'Show All Requirements'). Status filter + Reset; 'New' stamp (req creation > release creation date); 'Show Only New Requirements' filter. Columns: Requirement/Name, Description, Status, Backlog Link, Source Status, Evidence, Actions (mandatory) + Assignee (Jira only), Updated By, Update Date; Column configurator (Columns button). Bulk actions: Edit Selected Requirements, Submit to Jira (with Include sub-requirements checkbox), Refresh Jira Data, Add, Remove, Unlink, Relink. Jira actions per req (3-dots): View, Edit, Add, Remove, Unlink, Relink. Relink popup: shows Name, Unlinked Date, Previous Jira ticket (clickable). Evidence/Justification editable for Jira-submitted requirements (status greyed-out). Jama: Status, Evidence, Justification, Verification Status, Last Test Execution editable. CUSTOM REQUIREMENTS (Product Requirements tab only): 'Add Custom Requirements' button; popup: Name(m), Code/ID(m, unique), Condition, Category(read-only=Custom), Description(m), Source(m), 'Add as sub-req' toggle, Parent req dropdown (custom parents only). Bulk import XLSX with Instructions+Data tabs; Edit/Remove custom reqs; Custom reqs cloned with release; privilege ADD_CUSTOM_REQUIREMENTS (PO, SM, SA, Superuser). ACCOUNTABILITY (Process Requirements only): Accountability Role + Accountability Person columns; filter dropdowns for both. APPLICABILITY LOCK: 'Not Applicable' status disabled per req if BackOffice 'Can be marked as Not Applicable'=No; tooltip shown; bulk and file upload validation errors; Jira mapping validation. PARTIAL/DELEGATED statuses: Partial(lime)=evidence+justification mandatory, Jira ticket created; Delegated(grey)=justification mandatory, NO Jira. PARENT-CHILD SELECTION: dropdown on select parent (Select parent only / Select parent with sub-requirements); dropdown on deselect (De-select parent only / De-select parent and sub-reqs); only when sub-reqs visible. REQUIREMENTS STATUS SUMMARY: '+ Requirements Status Summary' link → pie chart by status; SDL Practice/Category filter; Include sub-requirements toggle. CSRR/DPP SUMMARY: same hierarchical view, single table, Status+SDL Practice filters, Evaluation Status filter.

nodes.label: JIRA
nodes.description: Integrated tracking tool for submitting and syncing process requirements, product requirements, and actions. Configured per product via Tracking Tools toggles.

nodes.label: JAMA (via Orchestra)
nodes.description: Integrated tracking tool for submitting and syncing product requirements via Orchestra middleware. Supports daily auto-refresh at 00:01 UTC and manual sync.

nodes.label: BDBA (SCA)
nodes.description: Black Duck Binary Analysis integration for importing Software Composition Analysis scan results (vulnerabilities, 3rd-party components) into CSRR. SIT/UAT in progress.

nodes.label: Coverity (SAST)
nodes.description: Coverity SAST integration for importing static code analysis results into CSRR. Server URL auto-resolved from BU mapping. Early planning stage.

nodes.label: Questionnaire
nodes.description: Questionnaire tab in release Creation & Scoping stage. Single questionnaire triggers BOTH Process AND Product Requirements. Both req tabs disabled/greyed until questionnaire submitted. Re-answering allowed after submission. Questions ordered by 'Question Order' field (drag-drop on Edit Questionnaire page). Conditional questions: formula-based 'Selection criteria' (LEAP); 'Is Conditional' badge on list. No tree logic (Next Question / Is First Question removed). 'Inherit from previous answer' setting per question (default ON = copied on clone). 'Link for the question' field shown under question during completion. New question types: Radio button (single select), Multi-Select (checkboxes). REMOVED: Toggle button type, 'Is Multiple Choice' setting. Show Inactive Questions toggle in BackOffice. Formula-based requirement scoping: req added if expression evaluates TRUE after questionnaire. Warning if inherited answers on clone (shown on Questionnaire tab until R&C submitted). Answer Code: mandatory unique field per answer (letters/numbers/underscore only).

nodes.label: Requirements Mapping
nodes.description: WIP: Manages mapping pairs between cybersecurity standards (e.g. IEC62443 and CTI/CTS). Backoffice CRUD, XLSX import/export. Frontoffice traceability view with hierarchy display and gap analysis.

nodes.label: Risk Profile Calculator
nodes.description: WIP: CRA Product Risk Profile Calculator. Users select Likelihood factors (Connectivity, Functionality, Operational Environment, Attacker Persona) and Impact factors (Health and Safety, Compliance, Operational, Sustainability, Data Protection) to compute Risk Vector and Risk Profile. Supports override with justification.

nodes.label: Report Configurator
nodes.description: Pop-up dialog on Release Detail page for configuring and generating PDF reports. Shows 3 section checkboxes: Scope Review & Approval, FCSR (disabled until FCSR completed), Actions Management. DPP section appears conditionally when DPP is applicable and release is at FCSR Review+. Generates Confidential-labeled PDF via 'Generate Report in PDF' button.

reportSections.name: Scope Review & Approval
subsections: Action Plan for Scope Review Decisions

reportSections.name: FCSR Results
reportSections.condition: Enabled if FCSR performed (FCSR Approved status+)
subsections: PCC Decision (if DPP applicable + High/Critical risk)

reportSections.name: Actions Management
content: Active actions table (Name, Due Date, Status, Release Number, Assignee, Category, Origin)

reportSections.name: Data Protection & Privacy
reportSections.condition: Available on FCSR Review stage+ when DPP applicable

nodes.label: Intel DS / Informatica
nodes.description: External integration with Intel DS/Informatica for training completion progress data exchange. Intel DS authenticates via Azure AD JWT token, requests SESA ID list via POST /trainees, then posts training completion data via POST /trainings/status. PICASso stores completion data and renders mandatory/optional training trend charts on Cybersecurity Residual Risks > SDL Process Summary page. Includes Backoffice settings for Release Related Roles, Learning Object ID, Required to work in SE.

backofficeSettings: Release Related Role setting for RACI roles
Learning Object ID field for trainings
Required to work in SE setting
metricsCharts: Learn More popup with trainings-to-role list

nodes.label: Data Ingestion API
nodes.description: REST API for ingesting data from external tools into PICASso. Uses OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials Grant via Azure AD. Supports POST/PUT/GET/DELETE methods across domains: Release Details, SDL Process Requirements Summary, System Design, Threat Model, 3rd Party Suppliers & SE Bricks, Static Code Analysis, Software Composition Analysis, FOSS Check, Security Defects, External Vulnerabilities, Reference Data. Authorization enforced via PICASso scope mappings per Client ID.

elements.authFlow: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials via Azure AD (Entra ID)

nodes.label: Data Extraction API
nodes.description: REST API for extracting data from PICASso Staging Area DB for reporting, metrics calculations, progress monitoring, and strategic decisions. Staging Area synced with main DB nightly. Supports three auth modes: system-to-system (OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials), user-to-system (PingID authorization code flow), and PowerQuery (Refresh Token via PAT page in PICASso UI). Data covers products, releases, actions, and all cybersecurity residual risk domains.

authModes.description: User authenticates via PingID, receives access token
User generates encrypted refresh token in PICASso UI, stores locally, used by PowerQuery M script

elements.patPage: Token Generation page accessible via PAT link in header

nodes.label: Requirements Upload (Outdated)
nodes.description: WIP (Outdated): Dialog for uploading Process/Product requirement statuses via Excel file. Users download XLSX template (Instructions + Data tabs), fill in Requirement Code, Status, Update Date, Updated By (SESA ID/Name), Evidence, and Justification. System validates file format, columns, requirement codes, statuses, dates, SESA IDs, evidence links, and justifications. Not applicable for Jira-managed products. Upload buttons hidden when requirements managed via tracking tool.

privileges: Update Process/Product Requirements with file upload

nodes.label: Manage Release Progress
nodes.description: The Manage stage of the release lifecycle where Product Owner or Security Manager works on SDL/Product requirements, CSRR, Action Items, Jira/Jama submissions and FCSR recommendation. Accessed via the Release Detail page when release status is 'In Progress'.

subSections.name: 1.3.3.3.1 Manage SDL Process Requirements
subSections.description: Update SDL process requirements one-by-one, in bulk, or via XLSX import. Submit to Jira (Capability/Feature/Story hierarchy). Refresh data from Jira (daily auto + manual). Sub-requirements sent to Jira as User Stories under parent Feature.
subSections.notApplicableLock: Some requirements flagged 'Can be marked as Not Applicable = No' cannot be set to N/A via UI, bulk edit, file upload or Jira integration

subSections.name: 1.3.3.3.2 Manage Product Requirements
subSections.description: Update Product Requirements status via PICASso, Jira, or Jama. Submit to Jama via Orchestra integration. Refresh Jama status (daily 2am CET + manual).

jamaIntegration.submitToJama: Select requirements → Submit Selected to Jama (excludes Postponed/N/A/Delegated)
jamaIntegration.orchestra: Sends to Jama via Orchestra third-party tool
jamaIntegration.refreshJama: Refresh Jama Status button + daily schedule
jamaIntegration.unlinkRelink: Unlink from Jama / Relink to Jama actions
jamaIntegration.statusMapping: PICASso SourceStatus mapped from Jama via config on Product Details

subSections.name: 1.3.3.3.3 Manage Cybersecurity Residual Risks
subSections.description: Populate all 10 CSRR sections. Data pre-populated from previous release if cloned. Auto-calculations in SDL Process Summary and Product Requirements Summary.
sections: SDL Processes Summary (+ SBOM Status/ID, Evaluation Status)

subSections.name: 1.3.3.3.5 Manage Action Items
subSections.description: Update action items manually or submit to Jira. Status mapping configured on Product Details page.

subSections.name: 1.3.3.3.6 FCSR Recommendation Provisioning
subSections.description: PO or SM adds themselves as FCSR participant and provides recommendation on release readiness. Done on FCSR Decision Tab.
subSections.validation: If Go with Pre/Post-Conditions selected, at least one action of that category must exist

subSections.name: 1.3.3.3.7 Tracking Release Progress
subSections.description: Visual progress indicators for SDL Process Requirements and Product Requirements completion percentages.

calculations.sdlCompletionPct: Count(SDL reqs with status Done) / Count(all applicable SDL reqs)

nodes.label: Clone Release Dialog
nodes.description: Create Release popup (button renamed from 'Create New Release' → 'Create Release'). If NOT first release: 2 radio options: (A) 'Clone from existing release' → Select release (latest default), Release Version(m), Target Release Date(m), Change Summary(m); Create&Scope button. (B) 'Create as new' → Release Version, Last Full Pen Test Date, Continuous Pen Testing toggle, Cont. Pen Test Contract Date (conditional), Change Summary; Create&Scope button. If FIRST release: 'New Product Release' (brand new) OR 'Existing Product Release' (onboarding). Clone button style: green → white+blue border. Cloning behavior: Process AND Product reqs cloned AS-IS (statuses/links/evidence). Clone status matrix: Planned→Planned, Delegated→Delegated, Done→Done(hidden), In Progress→In Progress, Not Applicable→Not Applicable, Partial→Partial, Postponed→Postponed. Warning on Questionnaire tab if inherited answers (until R&C submitted). Warning on Process/Product Req tabs (until R&C submitted). Confirmation checkbox before submitting to R&C (Submit disabled until checked). Actions NOT cloned (managed via Actions Management page going forward). Review & Confirm tab: no data cloned. Custom requirements: cloned with release.
nodes.trigger: Three-dots icon in Releases tab → Clone, or Create Release button (non-first release)

dataCloned: Release Details (Pen Test dates, BU SO FCSR date, Cont. Pen Test)
Process Requirements (all statuses, Evidence, Justification, Source Link)
Product Requirements (all statuses, Evidence, Justification, Source Link)
CSRR SDL Process Req Summary evaluation statuses
CSRR Product Req Summary evaluation statuses
CSRR System Design (info, components, countermeasures, residual risk)
CSRR Threat Model (all including links and residual risk)
CSRR 3rd Party Suppliers & SE Bricks + residual risk
CSRR Static Code Analysis tools + residual risk
CSRR Security Defects (SVV Issues, Pen Test Details, residual risk)

warnings: Cloned questionnaire: 'Some answers were inherited during cloning from another release. Please review and update if needed.'
Cloned requirements: 'Requirements were cloned from another release. Please review and update if needed.'

nodes.label: Requirements Versioning
nodes.description: Version control for process and product requirements database. When requirements are updated in BackOffice, releases in Scoping/Manage stages see a warning with options to keep previous version or update to new version.
nodes.warningMessage: Warning shown on Process/Product Requirements tabs when newer requirement version is available

userOptions.effect: Warning remains visible; can change later
Warning updates to info message; updated requirements shown

stageAvailability.Scoping (pre-questionnaire): Requirements scoped with latest version after questionnaire
stageAvailability.Scoping (post-questionnaire): Warning shown; manual re-scoping options available
stageAvailability.Scope Approval: Warning shown; manual re-scoping options available
stageAvailability.In Progress (Manage): Warning shown; manual re-scoping options available

nodes.autoTrigger: Configurable date in BackOffice; automatic mandatory update applied even if 'Keep previous version' was selected

nodes.label: SA & PQL Sign Off Stage
nodes.stageAlias: Security & Privacy Readiness Sign Off (when DP applicable)
nodes.description: FCSR Readiness Review stage where Security Advisor and Process Quality Leader review process/product requirements, update Evaluation Status, assess residual risks, and submit for FCSR Review.
keyFeatures: Task auto-assigned via My Tasks when release reaches this stage
SA and PQL can access all Manage-stage actions EXCEPT submitting to Jira
Evaluation Status editable on Cybersecurity Residual Risks tab
Auto-calculated fields: SDL Process Summary (Done/Total, FullyMet/Total) and Product Req Summary (across all releases, current release)
FCSR Decision Tab: Add Participant recommendations (Go/No-Go/Go with Pre/Post-Conditions)
Rework button: send back to Manage with mandatory justification
Submit for FCSR Review: both SA and PQL must submit
validations: If SBOM status = 'Submitted', SBOM ID must be provided
Both SA and PQL must provide recommendations before submission
nodes.escalation: Either reviewer can return to rework even if the other already signed off
nodes.sbomValidation: SBOM ID mandatory when SBOM Status = 'Submitted'

nodes.label: FCSR Review Stage
nodes.description: Formal Cybersecurity Review stage. Routed to SA, LOB Security Leader, or BU Security Officer based on Minimum Oversight Level and FCSR date. Decision triggers release completion or post-FCSR actions. FCSR PARTICIPANTS EXTENDED: 'Add Participant' button → popup with 'Release Team' tab (from R&R, format '<User>-<Role>') / 'Others' tab (Sailpoint UserLookup + free text Role); Both: Recommendation (Go/No-Go/Go With Pre-Conditions/Go With Post-Conditions), Comment (500 chars). Actions per participant: Edit (Recommendation+Comment only) / Delete (confirmation). Read-only after Post FCSR Actions or Final Acceptance stage. Release History logged for Add/Edit/Delete.

routingLogic.toBUSO: Minimum Oversight Level = BU Security Officer OR last BU SO FCSR > 12 months
routingLogic.toLOBSL: Minimum Oversight Level = LOB Security Leader

nodes.escalationChain: SA → LOB Security Leader → BU Security Officer → CISO/SVP LOB (exception required toggle)
fcsr_decision_tab_sections: Cybersecurity Risk Summary (group tiles → links to CSRR sections)
FCSR Participants (Add Participant popup: Release Team or Others option)
Key Discussion Topics (topic name + discussion details)
FCSR Decision (dropdown: No-Go/Go with Pre-Conditions/Go with Post-Conditions/Go)

outcomesAfterDecision.Go with Pre-Conditions: Routes to Post FCSR Actions stage

nodes.postFcsrActionsLock: Once on Post FCSR Actions or Final Acceptance, FCSR Participants section is read-only

nodes.label: Post FCSR Actions Stage
nodes.description: Post FCSR Actions stage — only reached if FCSR Decision = 'Go with Pre-Conditions'. PO/SM must close all Pre-Condition actions before submitting.

decisionOutcomes.Go with Pre-Conditions: PO must address Pre-Condition actions. CSRR and FCSR Decision tabs editable for actions only. 'Edit Actions' button at bottom-right.
decisionOutcomes.No-Go: Release automatically cancelled with warning to create new release

nodes.sbomValidation: SBOM Status/ID editable during Post FCSR Actions (Actions Closure status) but becomes immutable after Final Acceptance

finalAcceptance.trigger: Product Owner or Security Manager submits release for final acceptance
sbomValidations: SBOM Status and SBOM ID must not be empty
If SBOM Status = 'In Progress', SBOM ID must be provided
finalAcceptance.penTestValidation: SVV-4 Pen Test Details must be completed if SVV-4 status ≠ Not Applicable/Postponed

nodes.label: Actions Management Page
nodes.description: Standalone Actions Management page, accessible via link in Product Details header and release header. Shows ALL actions for the product across all releases (and actions created outside releases). Table columns: Action Name (clickable), Action Description, Status, Assignee, Jira Link (if Jira used), Creation Date, Due Date, Release Number, Category, Origin, Actions (Edit/Submit to Jira). Filters: Search (name/description), Status, Release Number, Assignee, Category, Due Date Range, Include Closed (toggle). Create action button: Name(m), Due Date(m), Description(m), Assignee; default: Status=Open, Category=Tracked, Origin=Actions Management, Release Number=No release. View Action popup: all fields read-only + Edit/Close buttons (Edit hidden if submitted to Jira or Closed). Edit Action popup: Name(conditional), Description, Category, Due Date, Status, Closure Comment (when Closed, mandatory), Evidence (when Closed, mandatory), Assignee. Fields editable depend on stage: same-stage → all; different-stage → only State, Closure Comment, Evidence, Assignee. Submit to Jira: creates Feature ticket under 'SDL Actions - <Release number>' capability. Refresh Jira Data: updates status/assignee/dates from Jira; last update timestamp shown. Bar chart: total count + per-status breakdown + horizontal bar. Error states: orange exclamation on Jira errors; 'Unable to load data. Try again, please.' Actions Management History: Date, User, Activity, Description; filters: Search, Activity, Date Range. Privileges: VIEW_PRODUCT_ACTIONS (view), EDIT_PRODUCT_ACTIONS (edit). Actions not cloned with releases going forward.

elements.chart: Bar chart: total actions + per-status count + horizontal bars

nodes.label: Product Changes History
nodes.description: Product-level audit log page accessible from Product Details header. Logs all product field changes and action updates not tied to a specific active release. Table: Date (dd mmm yyyy hh mm, desc default), User (profile image), Activity, Description. Activities logged: product creation, name/state/commercial ref updates, DPP/Brand Label toggles, Vendor, Product Definition, Org L1/L2/L3, Development Org L1/L2/L3, PO, SM, SA, PQL, DPA, Minimum Oversight Level, tracking tool, Jira source link, Project Key, Status Mapping, Show sub-requirements toggle, action edits from product details. Filters: Search (User/Description), Activity dropdown, Date Range; Search + Reset buttons. Pagination: 10/20/50/100 per page. Error message: 'Unable to load data. Try again, please.'

nodes.label: Roles Delegation Page
nodes.description: Roles Delegation page opened via 'Roles Delegation' button on Landing page (new tab). Table: Role Name, Scope, Delegated Person, Start Date, Expiration Date, Actions. Actions column: 'Delegate' button (no current delegate) or 3-dots: Edit / Remove Delegation. Delegate Role popup: Assignee (UserLookup, m), Start Date (m), Expiration Date (m; info if >3 months), Justification (m). Confirmation popup on Save. Edit: all popup fields editable. Remove Delegation: stops delegation, clears fields. Bulk Delegation: checkboxes + Bulk Actions (Delegate, Remove Delegation); Clear selection button; roles count shown when selected. CSO SPECIAL (BU SO + LOB SL): 'My Roles' + 'Org Level Users' tabs. 'Org Level Users' tab: User Name, Roles, Delegated Roles (X of Y), View details button. Delegate effect: delegate gets 'Delegate <Role>'; delegator retains access; My Tasks updated (delegate gets delegator's open tasks); email notification sent. Expiration: delegate loses access; tasks reassigned to delegator; email sent. Display on Product Details (Product Team) + R&R tab (SDL Roles): delegatee name shown with tooltip (Justification). Roles Delegation History popup: link on page; table: Date, User, Role Holder, Activity, Description, Origin; filters: Search, Date Range, Activity; pagination 10/20/50/100. Activities logged: Assignment, Removal, Update, Expiration. Privileges: DELEGATE_ROLE (users), DELEGATE_ROLE_CSO (CSO). BackOffice: 'Can be delegated' checkbox on GRC Role edit page.

nodes.label: PICASso Updates Popup (Release Notes Viewer)
nodes.description: PICASso Updates popup accessed via '?' (question mark) icon in page header (replaces 'eye' icon). Click '?' → dropdown menu: 'PICASso Updates' + 'Privacy Notice'. PICASso Updates popup: Search by keyword (highlighted orange), Type filter (All Updates / Release / Content), collapsible sections sorted newest→oldest, newest expanded + 'New' stamp, timestamps. 'View all updates' link → Spice+ page (BackOffice-configured URL). BackOffice: 'Release Notes Configuration' section under 'Notification Configuration'; Table: Notes Name, Notes Type (Release/Content), Release Date, New flag, Is Active, Actions (Edit/Deactivate); Create: Notes Name, Notes Type, Release Date, Body (rich text), New checkbox, Is Active; Source Link management: Add/Edit/Remove → 'View at SharePoint' link in popup; 'Show Active Only' toggle; pagination 10/20/50/100.

popup.items: Sections collapsed by default; newest expanded with New stamp

nodes.label: Maintenance Mode Page
nodes.description: Displayed when maintenance mode is ON and user does not have 'System Access during Maintenance' privilege. Shows header + body text configured in BackOffice 'Maintenance Mode Configuration' (under Notification Configuration). Header supports [START_DATE_AND_TIME] + [END_DATE_AND_TIME] placeholders. Superusers see both BackOffice and front office. Tech Admins see BackOffice only. Privileges: View/Edit Maintenance Mode Configuration (Superuser + Tech Admin), System Access during Maintenance (Superuser).

nodes.label: Reports & Dashboards (Tableau)
nodes.description: Tableau integration for reporting and dashboards. 18 MVP metrics including FCSR Approval Decision trending, Product Lifecycle Status, Red Flag Reporting, Product/Release Security Posture. 4-level Org filters (L1→L2→L3→Product). Role-based data visibility with daily permission sync. Includes requirements versioning reports: Product/Process Requirements actual on Date, Versions history, Change history. Accessible via 'Access Tableau' button.

nodes.label: API Exposure (Status Reporting)
nodes.description: Generic API exposure for third-party and internal tool integration. Allows unknown tools to report status + evidence (authenticated, with metadata). Connected applications: V&V tools, Pentest tools, Training compliance, Threat model tracking, SCA tools (BDBA, Black Duck Hub, Finite State). API designed generically to allow any tool to report.

nodes.label: BackOffice Requirements Versioning
nodes.description: BackOffice administration for requirements version control. Features: mandatory change confirmation popup when requirements updated (3 radio options: no trigger, add in N days, add on date), auto-incremented version numbers (v.1, v.2), Major/Minor importance classification, view/restore previous versions, requirement code immutability after creation, Applicability Code and Triggers fields removed. Export/Import XLSX includes version columns. Change History table logs all updates.

links.label: Edit Product → edit mode (same page, same URL)
Click Control ID in ITS Checklist
Submit to JIRA / Refresh from JIRA
Submit to JAMA / Refresh from JAMA
Generate Report (sidebar link on Release Detail)
submit SDL/Product reqs, actions to Jira
submit Product reqs to Jama via Orchestra
Product Changes History link in header
Roles Delegation button in Landing header
? icon in page header → PICASso Updates popup
Actions Management link in release header
Staging Area data feeds Tableau reports
CI/CD tools ingest data via REST API (11 domains)
External tools report status/evidence via generic API
BackOffice version changes trigger release warnings
Training completion data for Trainings list per role report
Access Tableau button in landing/product context

stages.name: Creation & Scoping
stages.routingNote: Questionnaire determines Risk Classification → affects reviewer assignment for next stages
stages.reworkNote: Can receive rework from Review & Confirm stage

stages.name: Review & Confirm
responsibleRoles: Security Advisor / LOB Security Leader / BU Security Officer (based on MOL + Risk)

routingLogic.toBUSO: MOL = BU Security Officer OR last BU SO FCSR > 12 months

stages.riskClassificationChange: If reviewer changes risk classification, approver route changes accordingly

stages.name: Manage
stages.submissionAction: Submit for SA & PQL Sign Off
stages.reworkNote: Can receive rework from SA & PQL Sign Off stage

stages.name: Security & Privacy Readiness Sign Off
availableTabs: Data Protection & Privacy Review (if DP applicable)
stageAliases: Security & Privacy Readiness Sign Off (when DP applicable)
stages.submissionsRequired: Both SA AND PQL must submit (2 of 2)
keyActivities: Send for rework if data insufficient
stages.sbomValidation: SBOM ID mandatory if SBOM Status = Submitted

stages.name: FCSR Review
responsibleRoles: SA / LOB SL / BU SO (based on MOL)
decisionOptions: Go with Pre-Conditions (→ Post FCSR Actions)
stages.escalationChain: SA → LOB SL → BU SO → CISO/SVP LOB

stages.name: Post FCSR Actions
stages.submissionAction: Submit (if Go / Go with Post-Conditions) / Release Cancelled (if No-Go)
stages.triggeredBy: FCSR Decision = Go with Pre-Conditions only

stages.name: Final Acceptance
responsibleRoles: FCSR Approver (SA/LOB SL/BU SO) — if Go with Post-Conditions
PO/SM — if Go (Post FCSR Actions skipped)
sbomValidations: SBOM Status + SBOM ID must be non-empty
SBOM ID mandatory if SBOM Status = In Progress
stages.penTestValidation: SVV-4 Pen Test Details mandatory if SVV-4 ≠ N/A or Postponed

stages.name: Initiate DOC
stages.description: Initial stage. DOC auto-created with Pending Initiation status when first release registered on Digital Offer product.
stages.nextStageAction: Fill DOC details and submit → transitions to Scope ITS Controls

stages.name: Scope ITS Controls
stages.description: Scope ITS (IT Security) controls for the digital offer. DOC Lead reviews and scopes each control in the ITS Checklist.
stages.nextStageAction: Submit scoped controls → transitions to Risk Assessment

stages.name: Risk Assessment
stages.description: Assess risks for each scoped ITS control. Input risk levels, provide evidence, add findings and action plans.
stages.nextStageAction: Submit risk assessments → transitions to Risk Summary Review

stages.name: Risk Summary Review
stages.description: Review summary of identified risks. Fill SDL FCSR, Data Protection & Privacy, and ITS Control summaries. Submit for certification.
stages.nextStageAction: Submit risk summary → transitions to Issue Certification

stages.name: Issue Certification
stages.description: Final certification issuance stage. Set proposed decision, validity date, collect approvals, and complete certification.
stages.nextStageAction: Complete → DOC status changes to Completed
